Title: Requires certain landlords and property managers to provide notice to tenants on proper protocols for recycling
Summary: Requires landlords and property managers of public and private multifamily buildings in cities with a population of a million or more to provide notice to tenants on proper protocol for recycling including information on materials that are acceptable; requires the division of sanitation to develop an example notice and make it available on its website for use by landlords and property managers.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to requiring certain landlords and property managers to provide notice to tenants on proper protocols for recycling
